title: Aadhaar Card Extraction Schema
description: Validated output schema for Aadhaar card document extraction. Covers standard UIDAI Aadhaar cards including both English and Hindi fields.

name.description: Full name as printed on Aadhaar card

name_hindi.description: Name in Hindi/Devanagari script if present

date_of_birth.description: Date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY format

aadhaar_number.description: 12-digit Aadhaar number (may include spaces: XXXX XXXX XXXX)

address.description: Full address as printed on Aadhaar card

photo_present.description: Whether a photograph region was detected on the card

vid.description: Virtual ID (16-digit) if present on newer Aadhaar cards
